Records.authors: Bargiela, Piotr, Frellesvig, Hjalte, Marzucca, Robin, Morales, Roger, Seefeld, Florian, Wilhelm, Matthias, Yang, Tong-Zhi
Records.description: $I^{**}_{4,1,4}$ two-loop topology with three internal paths of lengths a=4, b=1, c=4 (neither v_L nor v_R carries external legs); 6-point integral, planar (b=1). Geometry: 1 ISP; max cut ∫dz/√P_2(z); algebraic, dlog (§3.4 Type 1.1)

Pentagon ladder family, pentaladder_L2_massless-internal-dualconformal. Double pentaladder Omega^(L) (arXiv:1806.01361): L total loops, two pentagon caps + (L-2) box cells, 6 massless external legs (hexagon kinematics), massless internal lines. The double pentaladder is resummed to all loop orders via a Mellin-space finite-coupling formula. The one-pentagon variant is the penta-box ladder (5 dual points), a different object. CAVEAT: Scalar skeleton only: the defining integrals Omega^(L)/Omega-tilde^(L) carry a mandatory dual-conformal numerator (arXiv:1806.01361 eqs. 2.4-2.10); the seeded topology is the propagator skeleton, not the dressed integral, and carries no value.

Records.authors: Fevola, C., Mizera, S., Telen, S.
Records.description: Landau singularities of the double pentagon computed via principal Landau determinants.
